prompt: A full-body anime character design of a dreamy celestial ice princess standing centered against a clean white background with faint glowing cyan swirls and sparkles. She has very long, flowing icy gradient blue hair that reaches past her knees, with soft volume, glossy strands, a braided side section, and star-shaped hair ornaments. Add a delicate silver crescent-moon headpiece above her head, plus tiny dangling star accessories near the ears. Her face is mostly soft and pretty in shoujo style, but keep it simple and elegant. She wears a short fantasy dress in light sky blue and white, with a fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, translucent puff sleeves, lace trim, tiny floral accents at the sleeves, and a sparkling star-shaped ornament at the chest with hanging jewel chains. Around her neck is a moon-and-star choker necklace. The skirt has 2 layers: a short front skirt and a long high-low overskirt draping down on both sides and back. Decorate the dress with celestial motifs including 3 crescent moons on the hem of the short skirt, 1 large central starburst motif, white filigree patterns, glitter, and tiny star-like lights throughout. Add small dangling charms under the skirt hem and overskirt, including stars and teardrop crystals. She wears white thigh-high stockings, with 3 visible star decorations on the upper thigh area of one stocking, and glossy blue high heels with ankle straps, bows, and star ornaments on the toes. Pose her front-facing with one leg slightly forward, arms relaxed naturally, and hair spreading outward in elegant flowing curves. Surround her with 4 larger glowing star sparkles and 2 small snowflake-like motifs. The image should feel ethereal, refined, luminous, pastel, magical-girl inspired, ultra-clean, highly polished, and delicately detailed, with soft gradients, crisp line art, subtle glitter effects, and a premium character-sheet illustration aesthetic.
